title: Backrooms Today

𝔅𝔞𝔠𝔨𝔯𝔬𝔬𝔪𝔰 𝔗𝔬𝔡𝔞𝔶
'''Bringing you the top story from the back-alley of reality!'''
{{Underline|fff}} '''Description''' {{Underline|fff}}
Backrooms, Today! is a cooperative organization, specializing as a private news agency. It is the oldest and largest independent news agency in The Backrooms that isn't a state-run entity. Backrooms Today doesn't have outposts of its own, instead having headquarters situated within major metropolitan areas such as the [[Level 399|399 Megacolony]]. It operates as a unincorporated association, and produces news reports distributed to its members via BACK-CHAT. In recent years, it focuses on various reader centered initiatives such as an online blog as a platform for more opinion-driven content accessed by subscribers and members. Backrooms, Today! reports across multiple media formats, providing content to a wide range of media outlets ranging from TV, Newspapers, and digitally. It delivers newspapers mostly independently from its numerous printing presses, and operating within many metropolitan areas. Backrooms Today spans across ten different offices operated by some 564 employees communicating with each other online and adhere to a standard business hierarchy found in the Frontrooms. Over the years, Backrooms Today has endured numerous controversies and allegations targeted towards its legitimacy. Many ideologically zealous GOIs such as Ruphis-Proletarium have tried to infiltrate Backrooms Today in an attempt to twist narratives within their own favor. But that's not to say Backrooms Today isn't subject to personal bias from its own employees or bias coming from concessions made by the cooperative to expand its base of operations. Though it still remains the go-to news source and blog for independent journalism outside of state-run news agencies.
{{Underline|fff}} '''History''' {{Underline|fff}}
Its founding dates back to 2005, founded by primarily Shivira Dizedayokzhu and three other independent journalists formed a cooperative venture with the aim of providing news coverage of Ncipetherazi internal affairs. Its main founding member Shivira, is a Ncipetherazi entrepreneur who suffered a career ending shoulder injury during mandatory military service which led him to being hospitalized for x amount of time. After his recovery, he turned away from military life and started a small news agency mainly providing coverage via newspaper on cultural and domestic affairs within Level -406. It is at this time one of the other founding members created digital copies of its newspapers published to the Ncipetherazi database directory, unlike most news agencies of its time, was able to be accessed by outsiders meant as a media campaign to brodcast Ncipetherazi culture. Another part of its digital initiative was getting in touch with other independent journalists living within Level 10 in the crossfire, it offered journalists a larger platform to document their testimonies of the KC war. By 2006, it had created a branch operating in the Backrooms Colonists, but pressure from regional customers forced it to sell its service to various regional newspaper groups, the cooperative later had taken the name Backrooms Today as a transnational News Agency instead of being a Ncipetherazi-centric agency. In 2009, Backrooms Today partnered with publishing firm Colonist War Room Inc. to launch Backrooms Today-War Briefing which transmitted coverage of ongoing wars and the geopolitical landscape of the Backrooms digitally and through wireMeaning a system supplying syndicated news by newspapers, radio, and TV , cementing the creation of the news agency's new branch operating in the Backrooms Colonists, its largest branch. BT saw a large influx of subscribers and viewers tuning in to read the latest article published, it was renowned for its relative unbiased coverage of the Korthie-Casaiagen war and being a transparent news source. Ever since its remarkable success in the Backrooms Colonists, it eyed up the opportunity of having an office established in New London and confronted the M.E.G. via an online business meeting and offered the M.E.G's state run news agency an opportunity for syndication, a share of its revenue made from subscriptions, and gain access to stories they are otherwise unable to cover due to lack of ethos. BT hoped the prospect of mutual benefit between both parties would convince the M.E.G, Ultimately the M.E.G rejected the proposal out of skepticism of the legitimacy of its reports. BT inevitably had to offer concessions to the M.E.G. to gain the rights to set up office in New London, where Backrooms Today would aid the M.E.G's reporting with expertise in the respective field. In earlier years such as 2020, Backrooms Today encouraged a lot of troubles in the endeavour of setting up a new post within post-KC war Aurielle due to major security risks that plagued Aurielle after decades of war, and major financial risks as investing in Aurielle at the time outweighed the potential returns. It had high-insurance premiums and volatility in the region hindered it for the longest time. BT was under the constrains of ethical concerns as it would be viewed as profitting off a war-torn region and fueling its somewhat murky reputation. Though BT invested some money into Aurielle's reconstruction process post-KC and finally set up a news post in 2025 welcomed with open arms by Aurielle.
{{Underline|fff}} '''Hoax announcement''' {{Underline|fff}}
On June 1st, 2021, the official ''Aurielle Today'' (Backrooms Today's Aurielle branch) backchat and BT account posted numerous spam articles and messages pertaining spurious attacks on the Auriellen president, Arenet Matlon, falsely claiming that he had been killed. This led to mass hysteria and further distrust of Backrooms Today as it had been involved in major scandals before, like the Bottlegate incident regarding its security. Though it was eventually found out that the official ''Aurielle Today'' was hacked by [[BASILISK/Team 403|Team 403]] as apart of its broader egress cyber attacks on governments utilizing BackOs systems. The false alarms were swiftly taken down.
{{Underline|fff}} '''The Bottlegate Incident''' {{Underline|fff}}
"Bottlegate" is an incident that occurred during the rise of Agorean mafia in 2013, which involved the leaking of several Impesario class documents of the Backrooms Colonists and M.E.G, and using Backrooms Today's expansive online news network as a platform to spread aforementioned documents. The leaked documents entailed descriptions of Tulpa named ████████ that exhibited ████████████████████████████ and ████████████████████. The ████████ caused ████████████████████ to ███████████.
Addendum 1:
Parties in Attendance
*Interviee: Wen Zo (Boss of M.E.G BT branch) *Interviewer: CLASSIFIED *Source: Audio Call ===Begin Excerpt=== ---- ''landline ringing sounds''
''Pick up''
Interviewer: Hello, this is the M.E.G. I am calling to inform you that Backrooms Today has violated the terms and conditions of their agreement of setting up camp in New London.
Wen Zo: I'm sorry?
Interviewer: That's appreciated, but that does not change the fact YOU and your broader organization are infringing of M.E.G internal security.
Wen Zo: May you please explain what this is about?
Interviewer: This call is about the Backrooms Today news agency orchestrating a mass leakage of classified data via mass spam articles containing aforementioned data.
Wen Zo: Excuse me, the claim of Backrooms Today hasn't been engaging in that form of criminal activity, we are a neutral news agency in agreement with the M.E.G in Journalism. We would never have a direct hand in something of this cali-
Interviewer: Name the exact perpetrators who leaked sensitive cognitohazardous data capable of causing mass destruction to human life in The Backrooms. Or else, all current posts of BT will be shut down with other organizations following suit.
Interviewer: We barely managed to contain the data breach. I advise you to start speaking.
Wen Zo: Sir, that is purely libel. Our post suffered an attack from an armed gunman and another accomplice perpetrated a mass-shooting, The reason why our first responders didn't catch it sooner. Wait.. Wen Zo: I have just received word that one of the perpetrators was detained by nearby guards. We will escort them to a police jail in the meantime. Interviewer: Good. Once I arrive, I wish to meet him personally.
Addendum 2:
Parties in Attendance
*Interviee: Dorian Askewr [[File:Narchism_real.png|30px]] *Interviewer: CLASSIFIED *Source: Video ===Begin Excerpt=== ---- ''The interviewee enters the room handcuffed whilst being escorted by two armed guards''
Interviewer: Sit.
[There is a brief moment of silence and the interviewee's nervousness is in the air]
Interviewer: We know you did it. Tell us how it happened that day. [The interviewee remains silent]
Interviewer: It's very well in your best interest to start talking. I'm not exaggerating. Your life depends on what you say or what you don't say next.
Dorian: Took out one of the guys with my dagger, got inside the building , headed straight for the documents. Interviewer: Go on.
[Dorian wished to use it at this very moment, but figured he'd get shot the moment the guards see him try something funny]
Dorian: I grabbed the documents laying on the desk, I immediately sprinted down to the 1st floor, i was then spotted before i ran out the door, escaped but i was already shot

[points to his shoulder]
Dorian: I ran as far away from the military installation and ended up in a cramped alleyway in-between two blocs over there.
Interviewer: Reports indicate you had an ally nearby securing an escape route for you. If there are more, how many allies do you have in total? Where are they?
Dorian: About that- I heard the sound of gunshots from an [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/User:Elas5041/Sandbox/8 AK] and saw a corpse to my left and a shadow of a person emerging from the shadows. Something. someone was there. glaring at me while Im sitting down on the floor, I thought I was dead, that it was over. The man, while holding an AK, the fixed bayonet lustered and droplets of blood fell onto my pants. said "Hey pal, you look down." "Want some?". He shaked a bottle of [[Spice of Life|Spices]], he quickly got to work and poured some on my used to be injured shoulder. I was ought to reject his aid, I thought he was offering me help out of "kindness" and "hospitality" (says in a disgusted manner), but no, he was strong. He offered me help from his own free will, not to satisfy morals of the weak. He wasn't apart of [[Atrego]], he was living a primitive life adapting to the nature of the backrooms by exchanging "materials", his methodology is a bit deviant. Though he is the true example of the STRONG fighting against the WEAK. He offered me help as an alliance, a pact against the WEAK tyr-
Interviewer: Return to the original topic.
[Interviewer is slowly getting agitated]
Dorian: After he got me back on my feet, we talked for a bit and I found out about his [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/User:Elas5041/Sandbox/4 secret drug smuggling complex] in the city, asked him about the person he got rid of, and told me he was simply a "rival". I asked him why he struck out his hand to help me, he said he knew I was running from something and he sub-conciously figured I was a "friend". He asked me about the aforementioned documents, I told him I needed to get them around quickly. Luckily, he knew of a nearby Backrooms Today post on Azeutia Avenue. So we hatched up a plan ''Interviewer thinks to himself: I hear no remorse in his voice.''
Dorian:...to commence an attack on that Backrooms Today post and force an upload of articles with the contents of this document en masse, and for them to be pushed up in the #1 Top story on Backrooms Today. Don't worry, no one got injured.
Interviewer: What is your motive behind this?
Dorian: To leak the existence of the ████████ which will destroy every stronghold of power the tyrants excercise their control over and supress the STRONG and to eradicate the WEAK from the pure nature of the backrooms.
Interviewer: So what I can gather from this is that you staged the unleashing of a Tulpae capable of destroying mankind, whos information has been viewed by ONE MILLION people. That thing is fully manifested by now and is wreaking havoc out there and committing a genocide left and right. All for the sake of destruction.
Dorian: ..I-I suppose.. Yes.
Interviewer: WHAT THE FUCK DO YOU MEAN YES?
Dorian: ITS TO SPREAD FREEDOM AND LIBERATION TO- Interviewer: THE ████████ IS OUT THERE MASSACRING INNOCENT LIVES, COMMUNITIES, AND PEOPLE YOU HAVE EVEN CALLED FRIENDS AT ONE POINT. THIS WON'T STOP UNTIL EVERYONE IS KILLED AND WON'T SPARE YOU AND YOUR TWISTED ALLIES. YOU, YOU STAGED THE SHOOTING, MASS HYSTERIA, DESTRUCTION, DIVULGING OF HARMFUL INFORMATION, ALL OF IT!. THERE WON'T BE ANYONE LEFT TO "LIBERATE" ONCE IT FINISHES ITS RAMPAGE YOU SICK FUCK!
Dorian: FUCK YOU!
[Dorian tries reaching for something on his back but is promptly shot and killed]
''Post-mortem reports indicate the individual had doses of Nitrous Oxide within his body and an IED hidden in his back ready for activation. '' ---- ===End Excerpt===
